message:
Running command: 
# 1h01m25s CPU / ~17min elapsed. 0th iteration at 60% with 70,533 violations.
# Identical to DRT1 pattern! DRT is going perfectly.
# DRT1 0th iteration: 10% at 40s, 20% at 2:17, 40% at 6:29, 50% at 9:01, 60% at 10:02
# DRT2 0th iteration: 40% at ~4:43+, 50% at ~9:26, 60% at current... 
# The timing is roughly similar. DRT1 60% was at 10:02 elapsed.
# DRT2 is at ~17min elapsed (for steps 0-60%), which is slower but still reasonable.
# 
# Continue monitoring every 2 minutes

for i in $(seq 1 500); do
    sleep 120
    ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
    [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] OpenROAD EXITED!" && break

    head -c 524288 /proc/1100961/fd/11 >> /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null &
    PD=$!; sleep 2; kill $PD 2>/dev/null; wait $PD 2>/dev/null

    CPUTIME=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
    PIPEBYTES=$(wc -c < /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null)
    LATESTMSG=$(tail -3 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' ' | cut -c1-120)
    RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
    FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no")
    DRT71_FILL=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null | head -2 | tr '\n' ',')
    STEPS=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -2 | tr '\n' ',')

    echo "[$i $(date +%H:%M:%S)] CPU=$CPUTIME PIPE=${PIPEBYTES}B DRT71=[$DRT71_FILL] FINAL=$FINAL STEPS=$STEPS | $LATESTMSG"
    [ "$FINAL" != "no" ] && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" && break
done

function.name: execute_bash
